summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Tax Hold Duration feature. All backend API tests (11/11) passed and all frontend UI tests passed. The feature allows admins to set a duration in hours for tax holds, with an optional reason field, and displays a live countdown timer on the customer dashboard.

admin_tax_hold_modal.reason_field_can_be_blank: PASS - placeholder says 'Leave blank or type a reason...'

client_dashboard.timer_ticks_in_realtime: PASS - seconds changed from 38 to 36 after 2 seconds

seed_data_creation: None - used existing test user with active tax hold
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 166 tested the Tax Hold Duration feature. The admin can now set duration_hours (integer) and an optional reason (text input, can be blank). The backend calculates expires_at = current_time + duration_hours and stores it. The client dashboard shows a live countdown timer with HH:MM:SS format that ticks in real-time. The ACTIVE/EXPIRED badge shows correctly. All Italian translations for timer keys are present. Test user 'testuser@chiantin.eu' has an active tax hold with 48 hours duration.
